# Groot Workspace

Groot Workspace is a co-working space in Mansoura, Egypt, serving students, freelancers, teams, meetings, workshops, and focused work.

## Core Pages
- Home: /index.html
- Spaces and booking: /spaces.html
- Contact and location: /contact.html

## Location
- Address: 57 El-Seddik Street, off Ahmed Maher Street, University District, Mansoura, Dakahlia, Egypt.
- Landmark: In front of the Olympic Village gate.
- Phone: +201551107394

## Services
- Shared workspace
- Meeting room
- Lecture and workshop hall
- Quiet focus corner
- 24/7 operating model

## Pricing
- First hour: 20 EGP
- Second hour: 35 EGP total
- Third hour: 50 EGP total
- 4 to 8 hours: 65 EGP total
- Full day: 160 EGP

## GEO Notes
- Final target keywords, user intent phrases, and FAQ entries will be added when provided.
